Plan doc at docs/plans/2026-04-21-team-x-phase-6-m36-capabilities-taxonomy.md (196 source lines / 210 insertions). Zero code / zero tests / zero IPC/bus/migrations — plan-doc-only per the Phase 5 M28 T0 precedent (no T1-T10 task-level table pre-authored). Locked outcomes from T0 landing: (a) taxonomy count concretized at 41 (not ~40 — support category needed 6 to cover CS/tech-writing/tech-support/content-marketing/sales/devrel); (b) Q1 case-sensitivity resolved as lowercase_snake_case; (c) D16 reaffirmed (frontmatter not DB); (d) pack version bump 1.0.0 → 1.1.0 on backfill completion; (e) system roles (system-agent + system-copilot) get research + analysis flavored capabilities respectively. Head-of-queue advances to M36 T1 — author packages/shared-types/src/capabilities.ts with the 41-string locked taxonomy + type guards + category map + unit tests pinning category names + count + 3 representative literals per source-string-audit lineage (M35 T3/T8/T9/T10 → M36 T1 = 5-deep). M36 T1 is shared-types-only; parser extension lands in M36 T2; backfill of 57 role.md files in M36 T3+ clusters. Atomic + ledger commit cadence preserved from M35 T1 onward.
